title: Beehiiv vs Drip (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Beehiiv and Drip email marketing platforms. See pricing, features, and which tool fits your business needs.
h1: Beehiiv vs Drip: Detailed Comparison for Email Marketing
intro: Beehiiv and Drip serve different segments of the email marketing market. Beehiiv is built for newsletter publishers seeking growth and monetization, while Drip specializes in e-commerce integration and customer tracking. Understanding their distinct strengths will help you choose the right platform for your business.

comparison_table.tool_b: Paid only (starts at $39/month, no free tier)
E-commerce businesses with deep store integration needs

comparison_table.tool_a: Newsletter monetization, ad network, referral program
comparison_table.tool_b: E-commerce tracking, revenue attribution, SMS, onsite campaigns

choose_a_if: You're starting a newsletter and want a free tier to grow your audience
Monetizing your newsletter through sponsorships or ads is a priority
You prefer a newer platform (founded 2021) with higher customer satisfaction ratings
choose_b_if: You run an e-commerce store and need revenue attribution and purchase tracking
SMS marketing capabilities are essential for your campaigns
You want onsite campaigns and visual automation for customer journeys

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Beehiiv excels for newsletter creators and publishers with its free tier and monetization features, while Drip is superior for e-commerce businesses needing deep store integration. Beehiiv has higher customer ratings overall, but Drip offers more specialized e-commerce functionality.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Beehiiv or Drip?
faq.a: Beehiiv is cheaper initially since it offers a free plan for up to 2,500 subscribers. Drip has no free tier and starts at $39/month. However, both have identical entry-level paid pricing at $39/month, so the difference depends on whether you qualify for Beehiiv's free tier.

faq.q: Can I switch from Drip to Beehiiv?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms typically support importing email lists and subscriber data through standard email migration processes. You should export your subscriber list and automation workflows from Drip before setting up in Beehiiv. However, custom integrations may need to be reconfigured depending on your specific setup.
